FFlagSmoothClusterGeometryMultipleMutexe.mechanism: Optimizes how geometry is processed across multiple threads.
FFlagSmoothClusterGeometryMultipleMutexe.purpose: Enhances the visual quality and performance of clustered game environments.

FFlagDecodeHSROnLCThread_Staged.mechanism: Enables decoding of high-speed remote objects on a specific thread.
FFlagDecodeHSROnLCThread_Staged.purpose: Improves performance and responsiveness when loading game assets.

FFlagUpdatedGetDescendants_Staged.mechanism: Updates the method for retrieving all child objects in a hierarchy.
FFlagUpdatedGetDescendants_Staged.purpose: Enhances efficiency and speed when accessing game elements.

FFlagPPVEnabledOnConsole.mechanism: Activates player-to-player video features on console devices.
FFlagPPVEnabledOnConsole.purpose: Allows console players to share video content with each other.

DFFlagEnforceInstanceIdForPromptCollecti.mechanism: Requires a unique instance ID for purchasing collectible items.
DFFlagEnforceInstanceIdForPromptCollecti.purpose: Ensures secure and accurate transactions for collectible purchases.

FFlagFlagRolloutTestStaticBool33_Staged.mechanism: Tests a specific feature flag that can be toggled on or off.
FFlagFlagRolloutTestStaticBool33_Staged.purpose: Allows developers to experiment with new features without affecting all players.

FFlagLuaAppEdpVideoAvailableRamDeny.mechanism: Restricts the amount of RAM available for video processing in Lua applications.
FFlagLuaAppEdpVideoAvailableRamDeny.purpose: Improves performance by preventing excessive memory usage during video playback.

FFlagHomePhoneVerificationUpsellNewCopy.mechanism: Updates the messaging for phone verification prompts on the home page.
FFlagHomePhoneVerificationUpsellNewCopy.purpose: Encourages players to verify their accounts by highlighting the benefits of doing so.

FFlagRbxStorageRunInitInStdThreadLatch_S.mechanism: Changes how storage initialization runs in the standard thread.
FFlagRbxStorageRunInitInStdThreadLatch_S.purpose: Enhances the stability and speed of game loading times.

DFFlagEnableNetStackEphemeralEarlyPubKey.mechanism: Implements a new network stack for loading player clients with temporary keys.
DFFlagEnableNetStackEphemeralEarlyPubKey.purpose: Increases security and efficiency during player connections.

DFFlagEnforceValidUuidForPromptCollectib.mechanism: Requires valid UUIDs for purchasing collectible items.
DFFlagEnforceValidUuidForPromptCollectib.purpose: Ensures that players can only buy legitimate collectibles, enhancing trust in the marketplace.

FFlagFoundationDialogRootZIndex2_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the stacking order of dialog elements in the UI.
FFlagFoundationDialogRootZIndex2_Staged.purpose: Ensures that important dialog boxes appear above other UI elements for better visibility.

FStringPartyEmulatorBetaFeatureUrl_Stage.mechanism: Links to a beta feature for testing party functionalities.
FStringPartyEmulatorBetaFeatureUrl_Stage.purpose: Allows players to access and test new party features before they are widely released.

DFFlagEnableRefactorShowAdResultCounters.mechanism: Enables a system to track and display ad performance metrics.
DFFlagEnableRefactorShowAdResultCounters.purpose: Provides players with information on how many ads were shown and their results, improving transparency.

FFlagLuauInitializeDefaultGenericParamsA.mechanism: Sets default parameters for scripts at a specific point in execution.
FFlagLuauInitializeDefaultGenericParamsA.purpose: Improves script performance and reliability, leading to a smoother gameplay experience.

DFFlagServerStreamingPerfStatsPlayerCoun.mechanism: Collects and displays performance statistics related to player counts in server streaming.
DFFlagServerStreamingPerfStatsPlayerCoun.purpose: Helps players understand server performance and stability based on the number of active players.
